_important: MERGE into the existing mcpServers object. Never add a second top-level {} block.
_why_groups: Antigravity has a 100-tool limit per server. laravel-herd-mcp has 218 tools total, so we split into groups using the --group flag.

_groups.herd: ~70 tools — Herd control, sites, PHP, SSL, NVM, services, setup
_groups.laravel: ~78 tools — artisan, composer, database, SQL, cache, queues, Boost
_groups.monitoring: ~89 tools — Telescope, Pulse, Debugbar, Nightwatch, Forge CLI, Ray

_recommended_config_local_build._note: Use this when the package is NOT yet published to npm (uses local dist/index.js)

args: C:\Work\Laravel Herd MCP Plugin for Claude Code\dist\index.js
C:\Work\Laravel Herd MCP Plugin for Claude Code\dist\index.js

laravel-herd-infra._optional: Add this third entry if you also need site/PHP/SSL tools in Antigravity
args: C:\Work\Laravel Herd MCP Plugin for Claude Code\dist\index.js

_recommended_config_npm._note: Use this once laravel-herd-mcp is published to npm
